title: plectranthus preussii
intro: Plectranthus preussii, also known as Coleus preussii, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in West Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Plectranthus preussii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
